'''jamutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecotrope|cecotrope]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecotrope|cecotrope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jamutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæmitith|jæmitith]] || [[word:jæmitij|jæmitij]] || [[word:jæmitish|jæmitish]] || [[word:jæmiti|jæmiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jamumututh|jamumututh]] || [[word:jamumutuj|jamumutuj]] || [[word:jamumutush|jamumutush]] || [[word:jamumutu|jamumutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jamututh|jamututh]] || [[word:jamutuj|jamutuj]] || [[word:jamutush|jamutush]] || [[word:jamutu|jamutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jamuftuth|jamuftuth]] || [[word:jamuftuj|jamuftuj]] || [[word:jamuftush|jamuftush]] || [[word:jamuftuf|jamuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jamututhu|jamututhu]] || [[word:jamutuju|jamutuju]] || [[word:jamutushu|jamutushu]] || [[word:jamutuku|jamutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jamututh|jamututh]] || [[word:jamutuj|jamutuj]] || [[word:jamutush|jamutush]] || [[word:jamutu|jamutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jamututhul|jamututhul]] || [[word:jamutujul|jamutujul]] || [[word:jamutushul|jamutushul]] || [[word:jamutukul|jamutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jamututhuthu|jamututhuthu]] || [[word:jamutujuju|jamutujuju]] || [[word:jamutushushu|jamutushushu]] || [[word:jamutuku|jamutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jamututhun|jamututhun]] || [[word:jamutujun|jamutujun]] || [[word:jamutushun|jamutushun]] || [[word:jamutukun|jamutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jamututhuoro|jamututhuoro]] || [[word:jamutujuoro|jamutujuoro]] || [[word:jamutushuoro|jamutushuoro]] || [[word:jamutukuoro|jamutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
